patch.value: pm-web-pbl3
Spec new package pm-report for stakeholder status deliverables
Define pm-report package for generating structured HTML/PDF/markdown status reports from pm data, including progress, risks, blockers, milestones, ownership, and release forecasts.
Plan
open
codex-5-3
Spec defines report templates, data model mapping, rendering pipeline, customization knobs, artifact outputs, and verification snapshots for repeatable reporting.
Turn raw pm tracker data into decision-ready status artifacts for humans and agents.
A clear package spec that supports immediate MVP build and iterative template expansion.

## Proposed command surface
- `pm report weekly --format html --output weekly.html`
- `pm report release --release vNext --format pdf --output release.pdf`
- `pm report standup --team platform --format markdown`

## Reporting model
- Pull structured sections: progress, blockers, risks, milestones, ownership.
- Support template variables and section toggles.
- Produce deterministic artifacts with embedded metadata and generation timestamp.

## MVP milestones
1) markdown + html renderers
2) template engine and presets
3) pdf pipeline + snapshot tests
closed
Documented command surface, data contracts, MVP milestones, and quality constraints for implementation handoff.
Each new package has an implementation-ready plan item with concrete acceptance criteria and design details.
Spec body and acceptance criteria completed with command proposals, data model expectations, and milestone breakdown.
Phase 6 package spec drafted and acceptance criteria defined.
